docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY XAVIER, MIKE AS TO DEFENDANT NWIHIM, ADOLPHUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $75.00 FOR TRANSACTION R2510826S001 (SMALL CLAIMS > 5000), PAYABLE TO CHARLES E HILL III, DOC #1903354344, WARRANT #38109391, DATED DEC-22-2010

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT. 8, 2010. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF(S) AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COMM. PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
